system.moves:
- Dart about on agile wings
- Blend in, watch unseen
- Weave illusions to dissuade, distract, or confound

Guardian instinct to guard against old evil

- Cause slumber with their darts
- Make a brave, defiant stand

Worker instinct to prepare for lean times

- Accomplish great feats, together
- Swarm a threat

Hooligan instinct to amuse themselves at the expense of others

- Rile up beasts or spirits
- Play pranks
